# TransactionExpired

Fires when a transaction's time-to-live (TTL) expires before it was processed.

## Import

```ts
import { SseClient, EventName } from 'casper-js-sdk';
```

## Usage

```ts
sseClient.subscribe(EventName.TransactionExpiredEventType, (raw) => {
  const result = raw.parseAsTransactionExpiredEvent();
  if (result.err) return;

  const hash = result.val.transactionExpired.hash;
  console.log('Expired transaction:', hash);
  // → retry or notify the user
});
```

## Payload

```ts
interface TransactionExpiredPayload {
  hash: TransactionHash; // hash of the expired transaction
}
```

## Notes

- Default transaction TTL is 30 minutes. Set with `.ttl('60m')` on builders.
- A transaction can expire if the network is congested or the fee was too low.
- Retry by rebuilding and resubmitting with a fresh timestamp.
